overview.short: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Arakuzha is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Forane Church is a Syro-Malabar church in Arakuzha village, 6 km from Muvattupuzha, India. The village has a large population of Nasrani Christians. These Nasrani Christians of Arakuzha have more than 1500 years of recorded history.

topPlaces.name: Arakuzha
topPlaces.description: Arakuzha is a small village situated 6 km from Muvattupuzha in Kerala, India. The SH 41 connects Arakuzha with Muvattupuzha and Koothattukulam.

topPlaces.name: Meenkunnam
topPlaces.description: Meenkunnam is a village with waterfalls, rocky terrains, small hills, and paddy fields. It is located within Arakuzha and Marady Panchayat, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Vazhakulam
topPlaces.description: Vazhakulam is a village in Muvattupuzha Taluk, located in the Ernakulam district of the Indian state of Kerala. This town is known as Pineapple City due to its large-scale pineapple farms.

topPlaces.name: Avoly
topPlaces.description: Avoly is a panchayath located in Ernakulam district of the Indian state of Kerala. The panchayath is a part of Muvattupuzha taluk and consists of 14 wards which include Anikkad, Kavana, Kizhakkekara, Kottapuram, Nadukkara, and Pareeka Peedika.

topPlaces.name: Manjalloor
topPlaces.description: Manjalloor is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Manjalloor is a rural village, 3 km from Vazhakulam.

topPlaces.name: Anikkad (Muvattupuzha)
topPlaces.description: Anikkad is a village in Ernakulam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located near the Muvattupuzha town in Avoly Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Muvattupuzha

topPlaces.name: Enanalloor
topPlaces.description: Enanalloor is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Arakuzha?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Arakuzha is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Arakuzha?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Arakuzha?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Arakuzha at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Arakuzha?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Arakuzha start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Arakuzha?
faq.a: The top attractions are Arakuzha, Meenkunnam, Vazhakulam, Avoly, Manjalloor.
